title: KandyToys SupeRetro Balloon Modelling Kit | Includes Pump & Silly Eyes | Twisting Balloons For Birthdays, Parties, Decorations
features: Balloon Modelling Kit - This awesome balloon set includes 30 balloons, fun eye stickers, instructions and a pump, everything you need to get pumping and crafting.
Super Fun - You can create a mass variety of fabulous balloon designs to amaze all your friends and family with.

For All Ages - Whether you're a child, teenager or adult, this set is brilliant for all ages and will provide endless hours of entertainment making your wacky fun balloon designs. Give it a go, you won't be disappointed.
High Quality - These long twisting balloons are made from natural latex, this creates an easier process when twisting and turning your balloons into the desired design.
description: Product Description Whether you intend entering the next national TV talent show or entertaining crowds at an up and coming birthday party, then balloon modelling is the way to go!! Such great fun and kids will have a blast! Follow the guide or go off piste and try to create your own creatures. There is a pump provided so you won't go dizzy and blue from blowing up so many balloons! Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 8 years
